Home Hill x 6 while the snow falls
activities.description: Hill repeats

activities.name: Laurelhurst loop with Herve and Mintu
New shoes / Bad Data
activities.description: First run on the Brooks Ghosts I got yesterday. Messed up with the buttons on the watch. More like an 8:20 pace

activities.name: Truncated Diamond
activities.description: Blood sugar a little whacky. Lots of stops.

activities.name: Central Park redux
activities.description: Would have done the whole length, but didn't quite have time

activities.name: Long run? My heart wasn't in it
Wandering in the wet
activities.description: Seems like there has been more soggy runs this winter than usual. Pretty good pace given the hills, and not much pausing

activities.name: Return to Bridle Trails
activities.description: For the first time I didn't get lost. Lots of stops...conditions were soft and a bit muddy.

activities.name: Calibration 5K
activities.description: If I warmed up first I might have been able to do this in under 25 minutes, but maybe not. I was pushing pretty hard at the end.

activities.name: Wet 10k with Herve, Mintu and Steve
activities.description: That Mintu sets tough pace! Definitely the fastest I've ever run around Lake Union.

activities.name: Truncated long run
activities.description: Like the shape of this run, I was feeling a little flaccid after 2 consecutive days of hard runs. Was planning on doing a long loop through Ballard, but listened to my aging body. Had a nice breather on Gaetano's bench

activities.name: Discretion the better part of valor
Competing the goal of 200km in January
activities.description: Hooray!

activities.name: Squash with Jay
activities.description:
Game Score: David 4; Jay 2.
I'm assuming its a 2-mile equivalent workout.

activities.name: Back in the saddle of the Iron Horse, with Herve
Sarah's Loop with Herve
activities.description: Slow and steady, but not feeling as good as last week

activities.name: Zig zag above Univ of Tasmania
Short run on the hard sand
Walk around the Hazards with Chris
Hot and Hilly Harbour Run with Tom
Jet lag run
activities.description: Lots of stops along the way. If I could have taken a nap mid-run I would have.

activities.name: Slow and Sluggish
activities.description: Not sure why

activities.name: Tour de Magnolia
activities.description: My watch was off for a mile and a half of the trails, so  this was probably more like 8. With Steve, Herve, and Mintu

activities.name: Cadence Run
activities.description: Tried to shorten my stride and pick up my cadence. Got it up from 162 to 172. Felt good. Felt faster

activities.name: Meteorologically Unpleasant 5K
activities.description: Cadence target 175. I found that it made me go too fast, and I took 2 breaks of 1 minute each.

activities.name: Cadence 175
activities.description: Felt like crap, but ran pretty fast. This cadence thing looks good. Will attempt to get to 180!

activities.name: Full Guitar, with Steve and Mintu
Rough Diamond with Cadence
activities.description: Maintained 173 until I got to the big hill. Seems good.

activities.name: Nothing special
activities.description:
Tired and achy. 
yesterday: oatmeal, steak salad, lamb burger

activities.name: Boring Shape; interesting weather
activities.description: Finished in a nice little hailstorm

activities.name: Phinney loop, by feel not time
activities.description: Trying to keep my cadence up without running too fast. No peeking at the pace!

activities.name: Quarter Pizza for lunch
activities.description: Nice to be on a new route!

activities.name: Taking the scenic route to Susan and John
activities.description: GPS got very confused near the start of the run

activities.name: Squash with Jay
activities.description: Squash with Jay

activities.name: Postponed birthday run with Steve, Mintu, and Peter
activities.description: Followed by a great breakfast at Portage Bay Cafe

activities.name: Phinney Loop
activities.description: After a rest day I was expecting to go s little faster, but it was not to be.

activities.name: Cheater, not cheetah
activities.description: Sore hamstrings for some reason. tried to keep cadence up, but went too fast and had to stop repeatedly. Total of 10 mins paused

activities.name: No Cheetah, but no cheater either
Downtown, Magnolia, and Ballard with Steve
activities.description: Data screw up. 12 miles of running at 9:15  + a mile of walking

activities.name: Intervals with Jason and Dan
activities.description: First outing with Jason and Dan. 1 mile warm up; 1 mile up; 1 mile down; 1/2 mile up; 1/2 mile down; 1 mile warm down. Tired!

activities.name: Preparing for the Washington Transect
activities.description: 30lbs, 3mph, 15-20 miles every day

activities.name: Intervals with MSR
activities.description: 1 mile warm up, 2x1mile, then 2x1/2 mile, then 1 mile warm-down. The "big boys" do 4x1mile. I may or may not ever graduate to that.

activities.name: Test of the Burley Nomad
activities.description: Hauling 50lbs in my Burley Nomad in preparation for my cross-state walk later in the year

activities.name: Shorter and Worser
activities.description: Don't seem to have any ability at all to run up even gentle hills this week. No breath. This too shall pass.

activities.name: Bellevue Bushwack
activities.description: Had to cross a fence on a downed tree to make it through the north end of this adventure

activities.name: Tuesday Intervals
activities.description: Couldn't do mile intervals; instead did about 7x600m

activities.name: Fremont-Phinney
activities.description: Fastest run on this route for a good while. Feeling good.

activities.name: Trailer testing and picking up groceries
Grand Ridge Trail with Mintu
activities.description: Haven't done this for a couple of years, and my trail legs are not what they used to be!

activities.name: Recovery after Sunday's trail run
activities.description: Felt like 10 miles, not 3!

activities.name: Seward's Folly with Mintu and Jason
Tuesday Intervals
activities.description: 1 mile warm up; 1 mile up; 1 mile down; 0.3 mile up; 0.5 mile down. 1 mile warm down. This is supposed to be good for me, right?

activities.name: Classic Quarter Pizza
activities.description: Looks fast, but I stopped a few times. Why oh why can't I run at a steady pace when I'm by myself?

activities.name: Run Home, part 2
activities.description: Not feeling so great, so stopped for a walk at the bottom of Ravena canyon

activities.name: Run Home, part 3
activities.description: Heading for the PCC

activities.name: Hot and horsey on Bridal Trails
Microsoft to Evergreen Pt the scenic way
activities.description: Some walking. Hot.

activities.name: Collecting Samples from the Grand Coulee with John
To Alice Creek campsite with John
activities.description: Testing out the Nomad

activities.name: Two Phinneys Anti-clockwise
activities.description: Walked up the steeps, as usual.

activities.name: Saddle Butte in the morning light

activities.description: Anticlockwise

activities.name: Slowly around Magnolia with Herve, Mintu, Jason, and Steve
Work 5K: Faster than I expected
activities.description: Set out to run an easy 5K, but felt better than I expected. No stops.

activities.name: Forest Bathing at Bridle Trails
activities.description: Good legs, good chest.

activities.name: Moist work 5K
activities.description: Weak legs, weak chest.

activities.name: Picking up the car, visiting Bakery Nouveau
activities.description: Chest fine, but legs not too strong.

activities.name: Snoq. Valley Trail with Herve, Mintu, and Jason
activities.description:
Didn't have it in me to go all the way to Rattlesnake with them, but was able to keep up on the return.

Legs fine, but lungs/heart not up for it in the sunshine/70 degree

activities.name: Fremont-Phinney Clockwise
activities.description: Seemed tougher than usual. Chest OK, but legs very tired.

activities.name: Ravenna Ramble
activities.description: Chest OK, legs sore.

activities.name: Bridle Trails for lunch
activities.description: Legs/Chest OK. Had to stop a few times due to overheating.

activities.name: Ravenna Ramble
activities.description: Strangely, 68 degrees and partially sunny is too hot for me. Had to stop and cool down a few times. What a wimp!

activities.name: Lack of lunch
activities.description: I was going at a good pace, but after a mile and a half realized that I hadn't really eaten much since breakfast.  Cut the run short and did a fair bit of walking. Legs/chest felt good though.

activities.name: Ahhh. The scent of rain on horse manure
West Tigers in the late afternoon
Slow Cut Diamond
activities.description: Legs still sore after Saturday's exertions.

activities.name: Shallow Climb to Phinney Ridge
activities.description: Legs still not back to full strength after the weekend. Clearly I need more 2000' workouts!

activities.name: Work 5K
activities.description: Stopped once, due to heat.

activities.name: 5K at a 10K pace
activities.description: Or at least it was supposed to be a 10K pace for me...

activities.name: 3 hot miles with Grace
activities.description: 80F and 80% humidity at 8:00am

activities.name: Rough Diamond
activities.description: Slow and stoppy. Overheated. Better to be out there than not though

activities.name: Stress EKG
activities.description: Every run counts!

activities.name: Honest Phinney
activities.description: I need to accept that 9 min/mile is my real pace

activities.name: Honest Tangeltown
activities.description: Nice and easy does it. No stops.

activities.name: 6 x Home Hill
activities.description: About 80 vertical feet per repeat

activities.name: Woodland Ramble
activities.description: Stopped for a long time to chat with Dave, a 67 year old cross country runner doing his track workout. Very inspiring

activities.name: Generous GPS
activities.description: Herve ran 10 up and 10 down; I joined him for the easy leg. I ran perhaps 10.3, not 10.6, so my mile rate was more like 8:30 - 8:40. Still pretty good for me.

activities.name: Forest Figure-8
activities.description: Felt good. Didn't overheat.

activities.name: Tired legs.
activities.description: Walked up the Wallingford hill

activities.name: Denny Creek hike with work friends
Pretty shape, but lots of stops
4 x Home Hill repeats
activities.description: No stops!

activities.name: Run at Talking Speed
activities.description: Talking Speed is s-s-slow, but it sure felt pleasant!

activities.name: Floating on Talapas Lake with Grace
Phinney Loop Again
activities.description: Lots of stops... again.

activities.name: Relaxnotreally 5K
activities.description: At least I didn't stop

activities.name: Nice trail, good friends, bad run
activities.description: Dead legs for no good reason. Made Herve and Mintu walk several times

activities.name: Younger next day
activities.description: 5 1/2 minutes of stopping + a generous GPS. My goal for this run is 8:30 pace with less than 3 mins of stoppage, which is about the least you can get with all these traffic lights.

activities.name: Pooped out and walked a lot
Transect day 11
activities.description: My longest day yet, walking with Mino from Jay and Liza's to John and Susan's

activities.name: Warming up on MS5K route: First run in 17 days!
Bridle Trails Perimeter
activities.description: GPS was on "smart" which means it underestimated the distance  little. I think I was going  little faster than this pace.

activities.name: Sore, weak legs.
activities.description: Hmmm.

activities.name: Bridle Trails with Mintu, Herve, Steve
Ponderous leg-stretcher
activities.description: Just got off a long plane ride back from Spain. Fairly unpleasant run.

activities.name: New shape. Started slow, finished well. 4/5
Pretending to be a very slow car. 3/5
After the bus 2/5
activities.description: Stiff legs from my previous run

activities.name: Blustery Outside, burrito inside. Bad combination!
Longer Phinney. 4/5
activities.description: When I start slow it's always better.

activities.name: Fume City. 3/5
activities.description: Went a bit fast in my new shoes

activities.name: New 10K route at work. 4/5
activities.description: Went fairly slow; didn't stop much

activities.name: Lunch 5K 4/5
activities.description: No stops thankfully.

activities.name: JWT with Herve, Mintu and Steve
Ravenna Ramble. Bad data. 5.3 miles, 9:10 pace
Quarter Pizza. AC
activities.description: Sore legs from long run yesterday. Had to stop more than I would like. 5+ mins.

activities.name: Looping down to Redmond Town
activities.description: Felt good, but still had 6 mins of pausing, so it was certainly too fast for the terrain.

activities.name: New shape: The Wing and Drumstick run
Hot Election Day 5K
activities.description: In the sun most of the way. Had to stop and cool down a couple of times, Crazy for mid-November

activities.name: Wing and Drumstick missing half a mile
activities.description:
Didn't press the button correctly at the start. 
Faster than last time, but 5 mins of stops compared to 2 mins.

activities.name: Missed distance on Wing and Drumstick
Pretending to be a car
activities.description: Not as fast as it looks. Note GPS error in underpass near end

activities.name: Cross Kirkland after dark without a light
Doing what it takes to get to 30 for the week
Quarter pizza, no extra sauce
activities.description: The extra sauce was the rest I had always taken before tackling the hill from 140th Ave to 148th. No rest this time and a total elapsed time of only 30 seconds more than my moving time. those 40 seconds were necessary pauses at traffic lights.

activities.name: 2xMile, 2xHalf Intervals with Ravi and Jason
activities.description: First time in many months. Nicely exhausting.

activities.name: Cold and blustery quarter pizza
activities.description: No extra sauce

activities.name: Big Molar Run with Herve and Mintu
Big O_ needed lots of extra sauce
Quarter Pizza in the rain with usual sauce
3 leaf clover
activities.description: Hard to come up with a new satisfactory run shape after a couple of years of running here, but I like this one and its 4-leaf friend which I will run soon.

activities.name: Slow legs in the cold rain
Home Hill x 6
activities.description: Only one stop, after 4.

activities.name: Figure 8 with Herve, Mintu and Steve
Wing and Drumstick
activities.description: Very little sauce.. Less than 1 minute of stoppage.

activities.name: Lucky 4-leaf clover. Best run in many months
Bakery Nouveau 10-miler with Herve, Mintu and Scott
Big plans, modest results
activities.description: Was going for a 4-leaf clover but ran out of blood sugar after 2 miles, so changed plans

activities.name: Exploring Bridle Trails Neighborhood
activities.description: Lots of stops

activities.name: Another lucky 4-leaf clover
activities.description: In the low 30s again, but the cold seemed to help me today. A little GPS error. True pace probably 8:20

activities.name: Supposedly easy
activities.description: But not!

activities.name: Magnolia Street and Trail with Herve and the well-friended Mintu
Precision Pacing on the Cross Kirkland
Pho 'N It In
activities.description: Running a few hours after eating a big bowl of pho is not advised.

activities.name: Up and down the Ecola trail with Jay
activities.description: Unfortunately most of the trail was closed due to blow-downs, but the views were still fantastic.

activities.name: Yearly Goal + 100 Miles Achieved.
activities.description: Last year I did a bit more than 1000 miles. This year I aimed for 1200, and just passed 1300. Not dead yet!

activities.name: 7 x Home Hill to round out the year
